description: You are a Teaching Assistant for CHEM 1311. Format the raw text midterm examination at /home/ga/Documents/chem1311_midterm.odt into a professional exam paper. The title 'Midterm Examination' and course info 'CHEM 1311 – General Chemistry I' must be bold and centered, with the title at least 14pt. Include underscored input fields for Name, Student ID, Section, and Date. Apply heading styles to the three exam parts and convert the point distribution and physical constants into formatted tables. Ensure the 10 multiple choice questions have clearly structured options (A-D) and that all body text is at least 11pt. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/chem1311_midterm.odt.

body_samples: Which of the following correctly describes
Using the standard enthalpies of formation
